calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re: Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE FAILURE OF COUNSEL TO OBJECT AT DMV HEARING WAIVES THE RIGHT TO OBJECT TO CVT REPORT IN WRIT. PRESUMPTION ORDER UNDER EVIDENDCE CODE 664 APPLIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. =(301/JLW/dm) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
